microsoft_ft: **Scaled Azure's recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that cut operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model across engineering teams.

Pioneered Azure's first **proactive resilience testing program**, delivering a rack-level drill in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a reusable governance framework for continuous validation.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, owning the end-to-end coordination and decision log.

Built an **internal AI agent** and restructured planning workflows to reduce program planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill execution capacity by 21%, creating playbooks that let engineers focus on engineering rather than coordination.

Established program governance including milestone gates, change control protocols, and cross-disciplinary review cadences across 6+ stakeholder orgs, eliminating untracked blockers and **cutting unplanned escalations by 40%**.

Shaped the **product roadmap** by facilitating 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps that led to prioritizing intent-based YAML generation as a core capability in the next planning cycle.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by implementing rigorous **metadata standards** and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, reducing engineer lookup time by **83%** across key service team workflows.

Built a product strategy to eliminate operational toil during region launches, running discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort per region** and constructing an automation roadmap targeting the highest-impact critical paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and report program health in real time to senior stakeholders.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, maintaining a **prioritized backlog** that resolved 40+ high-priority tickets and stabilized the developer intake process across cross-functional engineering teams.

Drove **cross-disciplinary alignment** across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual handoffs between design and execution teams.

Authored program playbooks and dependency maps for the OS migration initiative, creating reusable templates that standardized rollout procedures and **cut onboarding time for new stations by 30%** across subsequent deployment waves.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a structured CRM process that created accountability and eliminated bottlenecks in the sales execution cycle.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile to improve top-of-funnel performance.

Strengthened leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering a data-driven framework to improve job-level profitability across service lines.
